headline: 2 Major Regional Bank Stocks to Buy on Favorable Industry Trends
summary: State Street and Northern Trust are well-placed for growth as the Zacks Major Regional Banks industry benefits from business restructuring, acquisitions, digitization, decent loan demand and lower rates.
